team_mission: Own Meridian's shared component library (Loom), the design-token pipeline, and the company-wide accessibility standard.

manager.name: Priya Raman
manager.ask_me_about: How Loom started as a side project and became company-wide; she also runs ultramarathons.

teammates.name: Diego Fuentes
teammates.ask_me_about: The Loom v3 theming engine and the token pipeline. Also a serious home baker — sourdough and pizza.
teammates.note: Also Austin-based; likely a natural in-person coffee for Maya.

teammates.name: Hana Kim
teammates.ask_me_about: Accessibility patterns and the WCAG 2.2 push; she leads the #a11y working group.
teammates.note: Closest peer to Maya's accessibility background.

teammates.name: Tom Becker
teammates.ask_me_about: Onboarding tips for fully-remote life at Meridian; he joined remote last year.
teammates.note: Will be Maya's onboarding buddy candidate (buddy is confirmed by a separate specialist).

cross_functional_partners.name: Sasha Patel
cross_functional_partners.ask_me_about: How Design and Engineering ship Loom together; the handoff workflow.
cross_functional_partners.note: Maya will partner closely with Sasha's team.

cross_functional_partners.name: Marcus Lin
cross_functional_partners.ask_me_about: The Loom v3 roadmap and how the team prioritizes.
cross_functional_partners.note: Owns the roadmap for Maya's area.
